revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-695

An oscillator which generates the local oscillations for beat reception. Its frequency is offset from the signal frequency by the frequency of the audio tone desired.

{{IALAFooter}}
